data.message: Move toward Hallway, can advance act next round
Wendy Adams took 2 damage and 2 horror.

Corpse-Hungry Ghoul (Hunter) was in Hallway. R10 Enemy phase: it moved from Hallway to Cellar (via Hunter), then immediately engaged AND attacked me in the same enemy phase. Per rules: Hunter moves first, then during the enemy phase, ready enemies at engagement range attack. The Ghoul was NOT ready at start of enemy phase — it was exhausted in Hallway (I evaded it R9). After Hunter movement, it would ready at the start of upkeep, not during enemy phase. Did the engine let it ready and attack in the same phase it moved?
